name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: our future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
Friend,

From the Presidential election, to control of the Congress and the Supreme Court, the next 6 months will define our future in many ways. And the rise of Donald Trump as the standard bearer for the Republican Party has made the stakes even higher.

Here in Maryland it's up to us to ensure that we keep this Senate seat blue and cross the finish line with a strong mandate for progress.

With this in mind, I want to thank you again for all your support and engagement in this campaign.

Whether you've donated, volunteered your time, or helped spread the news to friends and neighbors, you've helped build this grassroots campaign and its made all the difference.

Now our focus must be to expand on what we have achieved together and share our positive message with more Marylanders.

[**Please take a moment now to send a message to a friend or colleague about getting involved.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d0c/70cdc2ba/47e2aba2/396dbaf/1330436906/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/share/share-chris-s-message?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+take+a+moment+now+to+send+a+messa&utm_campaign=em050616&source=em050616")

This election is just too important for anyone to stand on the sidelines.

Thank you,

Chris
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d0c/70cdc2ba/47e2aba2/396dbac/1330436906/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em050616&source=em050616") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Last chance to sign Hillary’s card
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Today is the last day! | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjU0MzMxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMjEyNTc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjU0MzMxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMjEyNTc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

[**Sign the Mother's Day card now.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjU0MzMxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMjEyNTc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjU0MzMxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMjEyNTc3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjU0MzMxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMjEyNTc3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjU0MzMxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMjEyNTc3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjU0MzMxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMjEyNTc3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjU0MzMxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMjEyNTc3S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjU0MzMxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMjEyNTc3S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjU0MzMxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMjEyNTc3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjU0MzMxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMjEyNTc3S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU0MzMxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMjEyNTc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU0MzMxMTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODAxMjEyNTc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Hillary Clinton courts Jeb's "Republican fundraising machine"
body:
#
Take a look at this, sisters and brothers.
**July 9, 2015** \- shortly after Jeb Bush announced that his super PAC had raised $114 million.
_"We still don't know the details of who gave all that money, but we believe some of it came in the form of million - and even multimillion dollar checks from a small handful of right-wing mega-donors."_ \- Clinton campaign manager Robby Mook
**May 5, 2016** \- shortly after Donald Trump becomes the presumptive Republican Party nominee.
_"Hillary Clinton's supporters in recent days have been making a furious round of calls to top Bush family donors to try to convince them that she represents their values better than Donald Trump."_ \- Politico
Bernie Sanders believes that you cannot change a corrupt system by taking its money.
We are funding our campaign a different way. And every vote we earn, delegate we claim, and state we win from now until the convention is only because people have come together to say they are SICK AND TIRED of the billionaire class buying our candidates and elections. And that's why we ask:
[**Can Bernie count on you to make a $2.70 contribution today? Your donation, along with the thousands being made right now, will ensure we have the resources we need to fight for the values we share through the Democratic convention.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gop-money?refcode=em160507-s2-nonEL "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gop-money?refcode=em160507-s2-nonEL")
**Donald Trump's nomination means the Democratic Party has a generational opportunity** to establish itself as the party that will fight to provide health care as a right for every man, woman and child in this country. The party that will lead the way to tuition-free college so kids can graduate without crushing debt. The party that takes our democracy back from the oligarchy that Trump and Jeb Bush represent.
That is what the political revolution is about, and why your contribution is so important.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gop-money?refcode=em160507-s2-nonEL "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gop-money?refcode=em160507-s2-nonEL")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
